71.reason: [Comparing a char array (words[i].word) with string literals using != is invalid in C; this condition always evaluates to true and does not check for empty strings correctly. Should use strlen or check first character instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [Comparing a char array (words[i].word) with string literals using != is invalid in C; this condition always evaluates to true and does not check for empty strings correctly. Should use strlen or check first character instead.]
